description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the rust:latest Docker image. Define a job named test:cargo (which runs in the default test stage) that executes the following shell commands in order: rustup default nightly-2022-08-25, rustup show, rustc --version && cargo --version, rustup component add rust-src, cargo build --release, and cargo bench. The pipeline does not define any services, variables, caches, or artifacts. No special rules or only/except conditions are set, so the job runs on every pipeline.
